description: Elena confronts Daisy about leaving Mack behind in the Framework, and Daisy explains Mack's refusal to abandon his virtual daughter, Hope. Emotions run high as Yo-Yo insists she will re-enter the Framework herself to rescue Mack, but Daisy persuades her to stay focused on keeping Mack alive in the real world until they have a better plan.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)
